query: muddy low contrast gray oppressive heavy fog smog suffocating bleak atmosphere
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: low-contrast oppressive — fog, smog, monotone gray, weak tonal separation, suffocating bleakness

response.objective_caption: Railroad tank cars and boxcars sit on multiple parallel curved tracks that sweep toward the right edge of the frame, surrounded by gravel ballast, with fog obscuring the distant background and faint silhouettes of trees barely visible through the haze.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Railroad tank cars and boxcars sit on multiple parallel curved tracks that disappear into heavy fog, rendered in muted faded sepia tones with flat lighting and low contrast that create an oppressive atmosphere evoking unease and melancholic stillness.
